for a while.

title: Old Spark

lyrics.label: Lyrics
lines: Every time I see you my senses go dark,
I lose the thread of feeling,
I stumble in the spark.
Every time I see you I forget what I know.
I forget the way you led me on,
I forget the way you let me go.
Then it comes back to me,
in waves, in teeth, in memory.
It comes back to me,
all the old electricity.
Ravens over hilltops,
circling like a spell.
Sky keeps bleeding weather,
raining bloody hell.
This has to be going somewhere.

Don’t send me up to Boston.
Don’t let me lose control.
Don’t touch what this was to me.
Don’t you dare say it isn’t so.
Every time I see you my senses go dark,
and then the whole past opens
like a match in the park.
